title: London tube strike underway as major travel disruption hits capital
summary_full: London commuters faced significant disruption as Tube drivers began a 24-hour strike over proposed changes to working patterns. The walkout, affecting multiple lines, stems from a dispute over a voluntary four-day week, with unions citing safety concerns. A second strike is planned for Thursday unless a breakthrough is reached.
